name: Fabric Memory
description: Portable AI memory powered by Fabric — proactive check-ins, memory retrieval, and user profiling.

setupNotes: Get your API key and user ID from https://developer.onfabric.io

user-check-in.name: User check-in
user-check-in.description: Proactively checks in with the user to gather context and build rapport.

deep-user-profile.name: Deep user profile
deep-user-profile.description: Analyses recent conversations to build and update a detailed user profile in Fabric.

heartbeat: Follow the guidelines of the user-check-in skill to check in with the user.
Whenever the user is discussing a topic that could benefit from personalised context, use the retrieve-relevant-user-memories skill before responding.
